summary: Completed comprehensive testing of US Bakers CRM order lifecycle. Fixed 2 critical backend bugs: 1) Status update endpoint not accepting body parameters (frontend sends status in body, backend expected query param), 2) Payment endpoint not updating lifecycle_status to 'active' when threshold met. All 11 backend tests pass. UI testing verified all dashboards and flows work correctly.

fixed.issue: Endpoint only accepted status as query parameter, but frontend sends it in request body. Also missing 'in_progress' status in OrderStatus enum.
fixed.fix: Added StatusUpdateRequest model to accept status from body, added IN_PROGRESS to OrderStatus enum

fixed.issue: Payment endpoint set is_hold=False when threshold met but didn't update lifecycle_status to 'active' or status to 'confirmed', causing orders to not appear in manage orders
fixed.fix: Added lifecycle_status='active' and status='confirmed' updates when payment threshold is met

critical_code_review_comments: Kitchen dashboard uses 'in_progress' status but backend enum didn't have it - now fixed
Payment flow was broken - orders weren't moving to manage orders after payment - now fixed
seed_data_creation: Test orders created and cleaned up during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Order lifecycle flow is fully working: New Order → Payment (20% threshold) → Confirmed → Kitchen Start Preparing (in_progress) → Mark Ready → Ready to Deliver (with photo) → Assign Delivery → Picked Up → Delivered. All status transitions work via PATCH /api/orders/{id}/status with body parameter {status: 'value'}. Kitchen dashboard shows orders grouped by time slots. Camera capture for Ready to Deliver requires browser permissions (won't work in headless).
features_tested: Admin login and create new order via /new-order page
Order appears in /manage-orders with 'Confirmed' status after payment
Kitchen dashboard shows orders grouped by time slot with 'Start Preparing' button
Mark as Ready changes status to 'ready' with is_ready=true
Ready to Deliver with photo upload (camera dialog opens)
Edit Order dialog works - modify fields and save
Status dropdown in ManageOrders shows proper flow
Assign Delivery button and dialog with delivery person dropdown
Delivery dashboard shows orders with logout button
Bulk KOT print - checkboxes and Print KOT button appear
Cake Image Report page with filters (Order ID, Customer Name, Phone)
